ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot mimicking the act of riding a motor scooter.  The sequence will focus on the arm movements that would naturally accompany such an action. Frame 1 will show the robot with its arms slightly extended forward, as if gripping handlebars. Frame 2 will show a slight bend in the arms, as if the robot is leaning slightly forward. Frame 3 will show the arms straightening out again, as if the robot is maintaining balance. Frame 4 will mirror Frame 2, and Frame 5 will return to the starting position.  This cyclical movement will imitate the rhythmic motion of riding a scooter.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, gripping imaginary handlebars
a slight lean forward, absorbing the road
arms straighten, maintaining balance on the ride
leaning forward again, the rhythm continues
arms settle back, the scooter ride concludes
